title: Mobo's Structures
description: Pirate Ships! Castles! Dungeons! Towers and More! If you're an explorer, this datapack is for YOU!
body:
# Mobo's Structures

This datapack aims to increase the risk and reward of adventuring!

This is a beta release of a datapack I'm working on, and I plan to keep updating it as I build and code more structures! As of this release there are over 9 structures, including 1 massive dungeon-style Mayan Temple.

\* Tip: Use "*/locate structure mstructure:*" to find any of these in your world!

Here are the structures so far:


<details>
<summary>Pillager Fortress</summary>

![Pillager Fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/774564ba92d1fa53ee5a7d684d69ba192dffb3a6_0.webp)

This is a secret fortress where the Pillagers have captured an innocent Villager! Can you rescue the Villager and get the loot?

</details>


<details>
<summary>Keep</summary>

![Keep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a54c670941a41809f6b80b5a800a5e59008f653c_0.webp)

A friendly little castle, where villagers can safely trade in peace.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Pillager Watchtower</summary>

![Pillager Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/204efd8c51fe98e7d42df1ad646923033676d021_0.webp)

Here is where the Pillagers keep watch to scout out the villages they will raid.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Villager Ship</summary>

![Villager Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb9229831bc8786835fcbcbbe31ff010d3a6e563_0.webp)

A peaceful pirate ship trying to safely make its way across the sea.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Pillager Ship</summary>

![Pillager Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de48955a6b470c7709b8332c9511c5845d44bf1a_0.webp)

A hostile ship transporting a captive villager, as well as many stolen goods.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Ritual</summary>

![Ritual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213b1775a8a31fef455515256475b5ab2309ed78_0.webp)

A strange piece of land... what was this used for? I bet there's some secret treasure in here...

</details>


<details>
<summary>Wandering Trader Camp</summary>

![Wandering Trader Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3128b0ef2f05934a8ad6b4992dc53a0bb9e00bc_0.webp)

Variants in red and blue, this is where the Wandering Trader sets up camp before finding a player to sell to.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Dragon Fossil</summary>

![Dragon Fossil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e52d33c000767ae535de6ba2678f1cbfe508d528_0.webp)

Dragons used to roam these lands. How did they die?

</details>


### And finally, the biggest one:


<details>
<summary>Mayan Temple</summary>

![Mayan Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27c6c963ed3c8aa474964dc7d65d120bcff65add_0.webp)

This is a temple finally adding some value to the jungle biome. This temple goes deep undergroup and has tons of loot. Beware, I heard there were many boobytraps inside!

![Mayan Temple Sneak Peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f74e8fd8512d0e3619dd59dcf8b46aa8e42df21_0.webp)![Mayan Temple Sneak Peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cadff33cda89e5f93d56b269be12e4b54d8ddcd_0.webp)![Mayan Temple Sneak Peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06480debda026cdbfbed76acd5b3257e6e0c8c37_0.webp)

</details>

# Notes

Thank you for downloading my beta version, I hope you enjoy. I plan to make this project very active with updates, so make sure you like and favorite it so you can recieve notifications when I add to it!

Also, please give me suggestions for your structure ideas! I would love to hear them in my discord! Maybe your idea will end up in the next update!

[Discord](https://discord.gg/vdfdNqPuQw)
